name: hero-homepage
prompt: Realistic documentary-style photograph, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field, warm editorial tone. A young Pakistani woman in her mid-20s sits in the driver's seat of a clean modern white Suzuki Swift, hands at 9-and-3 on steering wheel, calm focused expression with a slight confident smile, warm olive complexion. In the passenger seat a female Pakistani driving instructor in her 30s (dupatta draped loosely over shoulders, not on head, in a soft cream long-sleeve top) is gesturing gently toward the windscreen, explaining. Both engaged and warm. Setting: quiet DHA Karachi residential side street, palm trees and low-rise villas in soft background bokeh, late-afternoon golden hour light through the windscreen. Modern dashboard visible, not luxury. Composition leaves negative space on the left third for headline overlay. Warm natural color grade, accurate Pakistani skin tones, no red-yellow oversaturation. No text, no logos, no watermarks, no over-smoothed skin, no AI-artefact hands.

name: hero-ladies
prompt: Realistic warm documentary-style photograph, editorial feel. A young Pakistani woman in her early 20s sits confidently in the driver's seat of a clean modern automatic white Suzuki Swift, hands at 10-and-2 on the steering wheel, gaze focused ahead with a subtle smile. Next to her in the passenger seat a female Pakistani driving instructor in her 30s wearing a soft cream hijab and a warm beige or soft lilac long-sleeve shirt (no brand logos), smiling encouragingly and nodding. Both women relaxed, partnership energy. Soft golden afternoon light through the windscreen. Interior clean, dual-brake pedal subtly visible on passenger side. Outside: quiet Karachi residential street, palm fronds in bokeh. Natural warm tones, no red-yellow filter. Composition empty space on left third for headline. No text, no logos, no over-smoothed skin.

name: hero-book
prompt: Realistic photograph, warm editorial documentary. A smiling female Pakistani driving academy receptionist in her late 20s to early 30s, warm olive complexion, wearing a simple cream or soft lilac long-sleeve shirt (no brand logos), holds a smartphone to her ear with one hand and a pen in the other. Soft natural window light. Background: softly out-of-focus professional driving academy reception — a clean desk with clipboards, a wall calendar, a hint of a framed road-safety poster, warm cream and off-white tones (no red accents). Warm genuine smile, natural skin. No logos on clothing or in frame. Composition leaves room on the right for text overlay.

name: hero-programme
prompt: Realistic photograph, slightly wide-angle, warm editorial documentary. Small classroom setting — five Pakistani students (three women two men, ages 18 to 35, mix of hijabi and non-hijabi women, modest modern clothing in neutral tones — cream, beige, navy, soft lilac) seated at light-wood tables taking notes. At the front a female Pakistani instructor in her 30s in a simple cream long-sleeve shirt stands beside a whiteboard pointing at abstract road-sign diagrams (stop sign, yield, speed limit shapes — no legible text). Warm natural light through a window on the left. Cream walls, clean professional but not sterile, slight warm accent. Composition leaves some space above and right. No legible text anywhere, no logos, no red accents.

name: instructor-omaima
prompt: Realistic natural-light headshot portrait of a Pakistani woman in her early 30s. Shoulder-length dark brown hair loose or lightly tied back, warm olive complexion, subtle natural makeup, small stud earrings. Wearing a soft dusty-lilac or cream long-sleeve shirt (no logos). Warm natural daylight from camera-left, soft shadow on right cheek. Genuine warm calm smile, eyes to camera. Background softly blurred cream wall with slight warm glow. 50mm lens look, documentary portrait feel, not corporate headshot. Natural skin texture visible, no heavy retouching. No text, no logos, no red clothing.

name: instructor-farkhanda
prompt: Realistic natural-light headshot portrait of a Pakistani woman in her late 30s to early 40s wearing a soft taupe or cream hijab wrapped modestly under chin, warm complexion, gentle laugh lines around eyes (experienced and confident). Wearing a simple charcoal or muted plum long-sleeve top (no logos). Confident approachable smile, eyes slightly crinkled. Natural afternoon daylight from window side. Background softly out-of-focus interior, neutral warm tones. Documentary-style portrait, real and warm, not glamour-retouched. 50mm shallow depth of field. No text, no logos, no red accents.

name: instructor-tehreem
prompt: Realistic natural-light headshot portrait of a Pakistani woman in her early 30s wearing a soft plum-coloured chiffon dupatta draped loosely over shoulders (not covering head), dark hair loose around shoulders, warm complexion, light natural makeup. Wearing a muted beige or soft mauve kurta neckline visible (no logos). Genuine warm patient smile, teeth showing naturally. Standing outdoors in soft late-afternoon light, palm trees blurred behind. Looking slightly off-camera to the right. Documentary portrait feel. No text, no logos, no bright red clothing.

name: faryal-portrait
prompt: Realistic natural-light founder-style portrait of a Pakistani woman in her late 30s to early 40s, shoulder-length dark hair with subtle natural waves, warm olive complexion, kind confident eyes, light natural makeup, small gold earrings. Wearing a well-tailored deep violet or plum blazer (color close to #4E0CB9 dark violet, not bright purple) over cream top. Warm confident professional smile, eyes directly to camera. Soft natural light from a large window camera-left. Background slightly blurred modern office setting with hints of books, a plant, warm wood tones, and a subtle glimpse of a clean white sedan visible through a window in the distance. Business-casual, approachable but competent. Documentary editorial feel, 50mm, real skin texture, no heavy retouching. Composition portrait orientation, subject occupies center-right, soft negative space top-left. No text, no logos.

name: og-homepage
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph 1200x630, warm editorial documentary. Right two-thirds: through the open passenger-side window we see a young Pakistani woman student at the wheel of a clean white Suzuki Swift, female Pakistani instructor beside her (soft cream hijab, warm beige or soft lilac shirt) pointing at the dashboard, both mid-conversation. Warm golden-hour DHA Karachi commercial street backdrop. Left third: softly blurred street and sky, empty for headline overlay. Warm natural palette — cream, neutral warm tones, no red-yellow filter. No text, no logos.

name: og-ladies
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph, warm editorial documentary. Right two-thirds: two Pakistani women in a clean white Suzuki Swift — instructor (soft cream hijab, warm beige or soft lilac shirt, warm smile) in passenger seat gesturing toward student (young woman, hands on wheel, focused). Warm daylight. Left third: soft out-of-focus DHA Karachi street, empty for headline overlay. Warm empathetic documentary feel, both women natural and at ease, neutral palette. No text, no logos, no red accents.

name: og-careers
prompt: Realistic landscape environmental portrait, warm editorial. Right two-thirds: a female Pakistani driving instructor in her 30s (warm smile, soft cream hijab, neutral cream or soft lilac long-sleeve shirt) leaning confidently against a clean white Suzuki Swift, holding car keys in one hand and a clipboard in the other. Warm daylight, DHA Karachi street backdrop with palm trees. Left third: empty sky for overlay. Documentary aspirational-but-real, neutral palette, no red accents. No text, no logos.

name: completion-certificate-closeup
prompt: Realistic close-up photograph, shallow depth of field. Hands of a young Pakistani woman (warm olive skin, simple bracelet) holding a simple elegant printed certificate — cream paper with a subtle deep violet and gold ribbon or seal detail. The text on the certificate is intentionally blurred and abstract (no legible words, just shapes suggesting a heading, body, and signature line). Background softly blurred modern classroom with warm wood tones, hint of a green plant. Warm natural light. Aspirational warm symbolic, neutral palette with violet accent only on the ribbon. No legible text anywhere, no logos.
